content.en:
Cha Haiyuan Shen noticed Ye Tian's arrival, and immediately said: "Your Excellency, leave here, this area has been occupied by my friend, please give face." "

He didn't want to fight, because it was easy to affect the Netherworld Hall Lord, otherwise in the outside world, he would have been unkind to him a long time ago.

"Chahaiyuan God, I have a conflict with the Lord of the Netherworld, if you choose to leave, I will not stop you!"

Ye Tian said.

When the God of Tea Sea Source heard Ye Tian's words, he was immediately very annoyed.

"You have a lot of courage, get out of the way immediately, or die!"

Cha Haiyuan God said angrily.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's breath enveloped this area, crushing towards the Tea Sea Source God, his meaning was already very clear, that is, he was going to make a move.

The God of Tea Sea Source no longer cares about anything, and directly does it, as long as he is careful, he will not destroy the promotion of the Lord of the Netherworld.

He was already preparing to kill Ye Tian so that he could calm his anger.

"Supreme Skill: Netherworld!"

A dark world directly appeared around Ye Tian, and the terrifying black hands were completely transformed by the Dark Eternal Rules, and the power of each blow was enough to severely damage the ordinary Supreme One.

And these black hands grabbed Ye Tian together, as if they were going to tear Ye Tian apart.

"Nice supreme skill, but it's a pity that the power is too weak!"

Ye Tian sneered.

In the next moment, an even more terrifying force directly shattered this netherworld.

Then.

The Five Elements Eternal Rule was mobilized by Ye Tian and turned into a world.

"Supreme Ancestral Technique - Five Elements Eternal Realm!"

This is a supreme ancestral technique that was deduced step by step by the ban of the five elements and fused with the invincible skills of the other five elements.

The supreme ancestral technique of the Five Elements Eternal Realm, which has both suppression, sealing, and defensive effects, is comparable to the top supreme technique.

Bang!!!!

The power of the Five Elements Eternal Realm acted on the body of the Tea Sea Source God, and the strength of the Tea Sea Source God was greatly reduced at once, and it was almost difficult to exert half of its strength.

At this time, the Tea Sea Source God finally realized that Ye Tian's strength was above him, far from being an ordinary supreme being.

"Run!"

He wanted to escape, but he couldn't tear apart the void here, which had been completely suppressed by the Five Elements Eternal Realm.

What's more, this is a treasure land in the depths of the void, even if many escape treasures can't leave here, they must go out through the entrances and exits.

In other words, he can't escape.

On the other side, the Heavenly Wind Source God attacked the defensive array arranged by the Lord of the Nether Temple.

Thundered!!!!

Attack after attack hit the defensive formation, causing the void inside the formation to shake, and the breakthrough of the Netherworld Hall Lord was affected.

"Someone attacking the formation?"

The Nether Hall Lord knew that someone was preventing him from breaking through, and he had even guessed who it was.

It must be his sworn enemy, the Tianfeng Source God, he was already very careful, and even invited the Tea Sea Source God, but he didn't expect to let the Tianfeng Source God know and attack him.

He didn't know why the Tea Sea Source God didn't stop the Heavenly Wind Source God, but at this moment he had to use his whole heart to attack.

But the Void Shock is getting more and more serious, in such a situation, how can he break through with all his heart?

Burst!

The Nether Hall Lord violently vomited blood, and his body began to crack.

He, the impact was interrupted, the breakthrough failed, and the foundation was affected, and his body was seriously injured.

"Heavenly Wind Source God!"

The Nether Lord was furious.

Crash!

The Netherworld Hall Lord rushed out of the Great Array, and really saw that the Heavenly Wind Source God was attacking the Great Array.

"Tianfeng Source God, I'm going to fight with you!"

The Netherworld Hall Lord forcibly cast a forbidden technique, allowing his injuries to recover quickly, and he fought with the Heavenly Wind Source God.

......

"It seems that the Netherworld Hall Lord has failed to break through, so don't play!"

Ye Tian was not ready to let the God of Tea Sea Source leave, after all, he had already offended, and with the nature of God of Tea Sea Source, he would definitely take revenge on him, and even implicate the human race.

Therefore, let's kill it.

"Shattered!"

Ye Tian casually smashed the Void Supreme Technique and bombarded the body of the Tea Sea Source God.

The next moment, the body of the God of Tea Sea Source was shattered, the vitality dissipated, and he was actually killed by a blow.

Then, Ye Tian put away the Void Ball of the Tea Sea Source God, and began to sit and watch the battle between the Heavenly Wind Source God and the Netherworld Hall Lord.

He didn't go up to help, and he didn't actually need his help.

The Netherworld Hall Lord forcibly recovered from his injuries, and he couldn't support it for long, and the final victory would definitely belong to the Heavenly Wind Source God.

The Netherworld Hall Lord also knew that the Tea Sea Source God had fallen, and his heart was becoming more and more desperate, how could he be the opponent of the Heavenly Wind Source God in such a situation.

Soon, his injuries recurred, and there was no time to stabilize them.

Abrupt.

The Heavenly Wind Source God slammed into the Nether Hall Lord's body with a single blow, severely hitting him again.

In a short time, the Netherworld Hall Lord was already severely injured and dying, and there was no longer a glimmer of hope for survival.

The Heavenly Wind Source God didn't leave the Netherworld Hall Lord with any hope, and he didn't stop at all.

In the end, the Netherworld Hall Lord still died at the hands of the Heavenly Wind Source God.

"Tianfeng, let's go!"

Ye Tian urged.

The Heavenly Wind Source God nodded and quickly left here.

Soon after, the two returned to the Tianlin Realm.

......

"Ye Tian, this time it's really thanks to you, otherwise I wouldn't have been able to kill the Netherworld Hall Master!"

Tianfeng Source God said excitedly.

"I'm also a member of Tianfeng Hai, so naturally I should make a move!"

Ye Tian said with a smile.

Although the Heavenly Wind Source God did not know what level Ye Tian's strength had reached, Ye Tian was able to kill the Tea Sea Source God, and his strength was far beyond his imagination.

He didn't ask too much, so as not to upset Ye Tian.

The two chatted for a while, and then separated.

In the following days, Tianfeng Sea prepared to erode the territory of the Netherworld, although it would not destroy the Netherworld, but at least it could take the opportunity to obtain some benefits.

And Ye Tian also indicated that he would retreat and cultivate next, so the Heavenly Wind Source God would not bother him.

------------------

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian came back and sorted out the Void Ball of the Tea Sea Source God.

He didn't have any interest in the Void Ball of the Tea Sea Source God, after all, what good things could be in the Void Ball of a Supreme One?

But soon, he knew that he had underestimated the Tea Sea Source God, and the other party's worth was really extraordinary, at least much higher than the value of those top ten supreme beings in the Star Ancient Domain.

One by one, things were sorted out by Ye Tian, and after being classified, they were placed in the treasure house of the Void Source Palace.

And the machine spirit also helped to sort it out, after all, the machine spirit has a wider range of knowledge, and can often identify good things that Ye Tian doesn't know.

Abrupt.

The machine spirit picked up a black statue and immediately let out a shocked look.

"Master, you've got a great opportunity!"

The machine spirit spoke.
